candidate_check.description: Flash player activation must be disabled in all Office programs.

check_content_excerpt:
Verify the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> MS Security Guide >> Block Flash activation in Office documents >> Enabled >> Block all activation is set to "Enabled" Block all activation.

Use the Windows Registry Editor to navigate to the following key:

HKLM\SOFTWARE\Microsoft\Office\Common\COM Compatibility

If the value for COMMENT is REG_SZ = Block all Flash activation, this is not a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Set the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> MS Security Guide >> Block Flash activation in Office documents >> Enabled >> Block all activation to "Enabled" (Block all activation).
title: Flash player activation must be disabled in all Office programs.
